sections.paragraph:
Original: חחי חח

Transliteration: châch châchı̂y

Phonetic: khawkh

BDB Definition:

  1. hook, ring, fetter, brooch
    1. hook, ring (in nose of captive)
    2. hook, ring (as jewellery)
      1. nose ring
      2. bracelet

Origin: from the same as H2336

TWOT entry: 620b

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
